info.title: Promptfoo Local Server API
info.description: OpenAPI document generated from the shared Zod DTO schemas used by the Promptfoo local server and web UI.

get.summary: Get prompts for a test-case hash
Check where an evaluation will be shared

post.summary: Record a web UI telemetry event

patch.summary: Update an evaluation table or config

200.description: Evaluation table data. `format=json` returns an exported table object and `format=csv` returns CSV.

get.summary: List metadata keys for an evaluation
List metadata values for one key

post.summary: Submit a rating for one result
Check whether a filesystem path exists

get.summary: Get the latest persisted ModelAudit scan

post.summary: Discover target purpose from a provider
Generate HTTP provider config from examples
Test an HTTP provider request transform
Test an HTTP provider response transform
Generate one or more redteam test cases

get.summary: Check Promptfoo version and update commands
List media items from blob storage
List evaluations that have blob-backed media
Fetch blob bytes or redirect to blob storage

403.description: Not authorized to access this blob
